final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing post-apocalyptic wasteland scene illustration (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 末日废土 (post-apocalyptic wasteland) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a modified armored vehicle
Scene/backdrop: must include a desolate desert, collapsed city ruins in the distance, yellowish sky, sandstorm atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a post-apocalyptic survival tension atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a yellowish / dusty wasteland direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a gritty, weathered surface treatment — exact grain / rust / dust level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
